summary: Recording of DHS Deputy Secretary Kristie Canegallo speaking at a podium with U.S. and Coast Guard flags at a maritime cybersecurity executive-order announcement event. It includes a DHS-seal bumper and burned-in subtitles of her remarks. It is a speech clip with no music.
notable_text: And that's why the President's Executive Order, it bolsters the Coast Guard's... to protect the maritime transportation system from acts of terrorism and others
